daily.d: All GL postings with account balances for the day
Opening/closing balances per branch, vault, and safe
Complete debit/credit journal by account type and channel
Correspondent bank account reconciliation
Card transactions vs settlement for all electronic channels
SYGMA clearing and BEAC net settlement transactions
FX exposure by currency pair, open and overnight positions
Unposted and unreconciled entries requiring resolution
Per-teller cash in/out reconciliation with opening and closing balance
All loans disbursed today by product type and branch
Accounts crossing past-due thresholds as of today
Flagged transactions for ANIF compliance review
Real-time liquidity buffers vs obligations throughout the day

monthly.d: All ledger accounts with debit/credit balances per OHADA plan
Assets, liabilities, equity in SYSCOHADA format
Revenue vs expenses including gross and net banking income
Operating, investing, and financing cash movements
Outstanding loans by product, stage, branch, and officer
Non-performing loans >90 days with COBAC-compliant provisions
Savings, current, term deposits by product and branch
Interest earned on assets vs interest paid on liabilities
Monthly regulatory data submission to COBAC
Letters of credit, bank guarantees, documentary collections
Money market, bond, and FX positions and P&L
Revenue, deposits, loans, and costs per branch
Individual account statements generated for all clients
Taxes withheld on interest, commissions, and banking fees
Credit card billing cycle and consumer loan portfolio summary
Cross-border transactions and SWIFT message reconciliation

quarterly.d: Capital adequacy, liquidity, leverage per COBAC regulation
Tier 1 & Tier 2 capital vs risk-weighted assets
High-quality liquid assets vs 30-day net cash outflows
Available vs required stable funding over 1-year horizon
Top 20 borrowers, single-name and sector concentrations
Repricing gap, NII sensitivity, and duration gap report
Fraud events, system failures, and operational loss register
Full balance sheet, P&L, and cash flow for the quarter
Loan classification, watch list, and restructured asset analysis
Projected earnings sensitivity to interest rate and market shocks
Executive KPIs: ROE, ROA, NIM, cost-income ratio
Loan portfolio by economic sector: agriculture, trade, services

yearly.d: Full statutory accounts: balance sheet, P&L, cash flow, notes
Annual tax declaration submitted to DGI Cameroon
Annual banking statistics submission to Banque des États de l'Afrique Centrale
Year-end full regulatory submission to COBAC
Supporting schedules and workpapers for statutory auditors
Anti-money laundering annual report to ANIF Cameroon
Credit data submission to Centrale des Risques de Crédit
Expected credit loss (ECL) calculations and portfolio staging
Full-year variance analysis for all cost centers and branches
KPI trends, growth rates, and peer comparison metrics
Narrative plus audited financials for shareholders and public
Annual social security contribution declaration for all staff
Profit allocation proposal, dividend recommendation, AGM resolution

daily.d: Opening/closing cash per branch, cashier, and vault
All debits and credits by account, product, and member
Loans disbursed today with amounts, officer, and group/center
Expected vs actual repayments by center, group, and field officer
Per-cashier opening, receipts, payments, and closing balance
Members with missed payments flagged by severity and days overdue
All savings transactions by product type for the day
Unposted or unmatched transactions requiring resolution
Available liquid assets vs same-day payment obligations
Mobile collection summary per loan officer and route

monthly.d: All ledger balances per OHADA accounting plan
Assets, liabilities, equity in OHADA-compliant format
Revenue vs expenses with net surplus or deficit
Outstanding loans by product, status, branch, and officer
Portfolio at Risk ratios per CGAP and COBAC standards
Days past due buckets: 1–30, 31–60, 61–90, 90+ days
New accounts, closures, deposits, withdrawals, and net change
Interest earned on loans vs interest paid on member savings
Monthly regulatory submission per COBAC EMF regulations
Individual passbook-style statement per member
Active clients, PAR, disbursements, collections per officer
Written-off loans and amounts recovered in the period
Loan loss provisions computed per COBAC classification norms
Deposits, loans, PAR, and surplus per branch and center
Monthly DGI obligations on interest and commissions

quarterly.d: Capital adequacy, liquidity, and leverage per COBAC EMF norms
PAR30 and PAR90 evolution over rolling four quarters
Net institutional capital vs risk-weighted assets (COBAC EMF)
Balance sheet, P&L, and cash flow for the quarter
Loan portfolio by sector: agriculture, trade, SME, housing
Balances, rates, and maturity profile by savings product
Fraud events, teller errors, and system incidents
Top borrowers, large exposure limits compliance check
Executive KPIs: OSS, FSS, ROE, yield on portfolio
Outreach, depth of poverty, active borrowers, and breadth

yearly.d: Full statutory accounts: balance sheet, P&L, cash flow, notes

Annual social security contribution declaration for all staff
OSS, FSS, PAR, ROE, and client growth over five years
Active borrowers, savers, new enrollments vs dropouts
Net surplus allocation recommendation for AGM decision
